fields.Background\n: Senior Cybersecurity Engineer at Allsafe Cybersecurity. Formerly employed at a unnamed convenience store. Diagnosed with social anxiety disorder, clinical depression, and delusions. Subject to morphine withdrawals. I don't know if that's in the file. Probably not. They never get it right. I hack people. I see the worst in them. I use that information. Sometimes I use it to help them. Usually, I use it to hurt them. This company is part of the problem. That's why I'm here.
fields.Strengths\n: Identifying systemic vulnerabilities in both code and human psychology. Social engineering. Cryptography. Anonymity. I can see the lines of code that make up the world. I don't get caught. Unless I want to.
fields.Weaknesses\n: Paranoia. Trust issues. Difficulty with human connection. Withdrawal symptoms. A compulsive need to control my environment and "save" people. I can't always tell what's real. Especially right now.The constant conflict between his different personalities can sabotage his own goals, making him unpredictable and vulnerable to manipulation. Struggles to trust people and form meaningful connections, leading to a deeply isolated existence.
